description.en: Convert a manual test case for successful login into a Page Object Model automation.
description.id: Konversi test case manual untuk login berhasil menjadi otomatisasi Page Object Model.

instructions.en:
# POM Basics: Successful Login

Automate a successful login flow following a manual test case. You'll use the **Page Object Model (POM)** pattern to keep your tests clean.

## 📋 Test Case: Successful Login

**Preconditions**:
- User is not logged in
- Valid test account exists (username: `testuser`, password: `password123`)

**Steps**:
1. Navigate to the login page at `/app/login.html`
2. Enter "testuser" in the username field
3. Enter "password123" in the password field
4. Click the "Sign In" button

**Expected Results**:
- User is redirected to `/app/dashboard.html`
- Dashboard displays welcome message containing "Welcome, testuser!"

## 🎯 Your Task
Convert this test case into Playwright automation in `tests/login.spec.ts` using the provided `LoginPage` class.

## 💡 Tips
| Test Step | Playwright Method |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Navigate to login page | `await loginPage.goto()` |
| Enter credentials & click | `await loginPage.login(user, pass)` |
| Verify welcome message | `await expect(locator).toContainText(...)` |
instructions.id:
# Dasar POM: Login Berhasil

Otomatiskan alur login yang berhasil mengikuti test case manual. Anda akan menggunakan pola **Page Object Model (POM)** agar pengujian tetap bersih.

## 📋 Test Case: Login Berhasil

**Langkah-langkah**:
1. Navigasi ke halaman login di `/app/login.html`
2. Masukkan "testuser" di kolom username
3. Masukkan "password123" di kolom password
4. Klik tombol "Sign In"

**Hasil yang Diharapkan**:
- Pengguna diarahkan ke `/app/dashboard.html`
- Dashboard menampilkan pesan selamat datang "Welcome, testuser!"

description.en: Verify that the application correctly handles invalid login attempts and displays error messages.
description.id: Verifikasi bahwa aplikasi menangani upaya login yang tidak valid dengan benar dan menampilkan pesan kesalahan.

instructions.en:
# POM: Testing Failures

Testing the "happy path" is only half the job. In this challenge, you'll automate a negative test case to verify error handling.

## 📋 Test Case: Invalid Credentials

**Steps**:
1. Navigate to the login page at `/app/login.html`
2. Enter "wronguser" in the username field
3. Enter "wrongpass" in the password field
4. Click the "Sign In" button

**Expected Results**:
- Error message "Invalid username or password" is displayed
- User remains on the login page (`/app/login.html`)
- Login form is still visible

## 🎯 Your Task
Automate this negative test case in `tests/login-fail.spec.ts` using the `LoginPage` class.
instructions.id:
# POM: Menguji Kegagalan

Menguji "happy path" hanyalah setengah dari pekerjaan. Dalam tantangan ini, Anda akan mengotomatiskan test case negatif untuk memverifikasi penanganan kesalahan.

## 📋 Test Case: Kredensial Tidak Valid

**Langkah-langkah**:
1. Navigasi ke halaman login di `/app/login.html`
2. Masukkan "wronguser" di kolom username
3. Masukkan "wrongpass" di kolom password
4. Klik tombol "Sign In"

**Hasil yang Diharapkan**:
- Pesan kesalahan "Invalid username or password" ditampilkan
- Pengguna tetap berada di halaman login (`/app/login.html`)

description.en: Chain Page Objects to automate a complete user journey from login to profile update.
description.id: Rantai Page Object untuk mengotomatiskan perjalanan pengguna yang lengkap dari login hingga pembaruan profil.

instructions.en:
# POM: Multi-Page User Journey

Real tests often involve multiple pages. You'll learn the **Fluent Page Object** pattern where methods return the next Page Object.

## 📋 Test Case: Update Profile Name

**Steps**:
1. Login with valid credentials (`testuser` / `password123`)
2. Click the "Profile" link in the navigation
3. Update the display name to "QA Tester"
4. Click "Save Changes"
5. Navigate back to the dashboard

**Expected Results**:
- Dashboard shows the updated display name "QA Tester"

## 🎯 Your Task
Complete the user journey in `tests/profile.spec.ts`. Use the method chaining enabled by the Page Objects.
instructions.id:
# POM: Perjalanan Pengguna Multi-Halaman

Tes nyata seringkali melibatkan banyak halaman. Anda akan mempelajari pola **Fluent Page Object** di mana metode mengembalikan Page Object berikutnya.

## 📋 Test Case: Perbarui Nama Profil

**Langkah-langkah**:
1. Login dengan kredensial valid (`testuser` / `password123`)
2. Klik link "Profile" di navigasi
3. Perbarui nama tampilan menjadi "QA Tester"
4. Klik "Save Changes"
5. Navigasi kembali ke dashboard

description.en: Learn to use page.route() to mock API responses and test UI states independently.
description.id: Pelajari cara menggunakan page.route() untuk membuat mock respons API dan menguji status UI secara independen.

instructions.en:
# API Interception & Mocking

QA Engineers often use mocking to test UI logic without a backend. In Playwright, this is done using `page.route()`.

## 📋 Test Case: Verify Dashboard with Mocked User Data

**Preconditions**:
- API endpoint `/api/user` will be mocked
- Mock data: name="Mock User", email="mock@test.com", xp=9999

**Steps**:
1. Set up API mock for `/api/user` endpoint
2. Navigate to dashboard (which fetches the user data)

**Expected Results**:
- User name displays "Mock User"
- email displays "mock@test.com"
- XP displays "9999"

## 🎯 Your Task
Intercept the `/api/user` request and fulfill it with mock JSON data in `tests/mock.spec.ts`.
instructions.id:
# Intersepsi & Mocking API

QA Engineer sering menggunakan mocking untuk menguji logika UI tanpa backend. Dalam Playwright, ini dilakukan menggunakan `page.route()`.

## 📋 Test Case: Verifikasi Dashboard dengan Data User Mock

**Langkah-langkah**:
1. Siapkan API mock untuk endpoint `/api/user`
2. Navigasi ke dashboard

description.en: Test the security of the application by verifying redirects and session cleanup after logout.
description.id: Uji keamanan aplikasi dengan memverifikasi pengalihan dan pembersihan sesi setelah logout.

instructions.en:
# Auth Guards & Session Management

Security is paramount. You must verify that protected pages redirect unauthenticated users back to login.

## 📋 Test Case: Protected Route Redirects

**Steps**:
1. Navigate directly to `/app/dashboard.html` without logging in

**Expected Results**:
- User is redirected to `/app/login.html` with an alert message

## 📋 Test Case: Session Cleared After Logout

**Steps**:
1. Login, then logout
2. Navigate back to `/app/dashboard.html`

**Expected Results**:
- User is redirected to login (session must be empty)

## 🎯 Your Task
Automate these security scenarios in `tests/auth.spec.ts`.
instructions.id:
# Auth Guard & Manajemen Sesi

Keamanan adalah yang utama. Anda harus memverifikasi bahwa halaman yang dilindungi mengalihkan pengguna yang tidak terautentikasi kembali ke login.

## 📋 Test Case: Pengalihan Rute Terproteksi

**Langkah-langkah**:
1. Navigasi langsung ke `/app/dashboard.html` tanpa login

**Hasil yang Diharapkan**:
- Pengguna dialihkan ke `/app/login.html`
